news.t: Defiance ETFs Launches ASTN: The First 2X Short ETF of AST SpaceMobile Inc.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Short ASTS ETF (ASTN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund seeks to provide 2x inverse exposure to the daily share price movement of AST SpaceMobile, Inc. (NYSE: ASTS), less fees and expenses. ASTN was launched on Feb 5, 2026 and is issued by Defiance.
